query: My ElevenLabs agent's webhook tool keeps returning 401. I set the auth header in the tool config to X-Site-Key: {{my_site_key}}, referencing a workspace secret named my_site_key. What's wrong?
expected_behavior: identify that a header secret must be a structured object {"secret_id": "..."}, not a {{name}} string
explain the {{name}} string is sent literally (not interpolated) so the endpoint 401s
tell the user to check the secret's used_by.tools to confirm the reference actually linked
note the secret must also hold the correct value (PATCH /convai/secrets/{id})
notes: Guards against the header-secret 401. Baseline guessed 'bind via selector' but did not know the {secret_id} structure or the used_by check.
